headline: Binjai flood prompts limited evacuation in low-lying neighborhoods
summary: Banjir di Binjai menyebabkan genangan permukiman dan evakuasi terbatas pada warga di titik terendah lingkungan.
summary_id: Banjir di Binjai menyebabkan genangan permukiman dan evakuasi terbatas pada warga di titik terendah lingkungan.
summary_en: Flooding in Binjai caused residential inundation and limited evacuation for residents in the lowest-lying neighborhood pockets.
